info.name: TherapyCenter API
info.description:
Therapy Center ASP.NET Core Web API — generated from controllers/DTOs in-repo.

**Suggested flow (example)**
1. **Login Admin** (seed: `admin@therapy.com` / `123456` from `AdminSeeder`) — saves `adminToken`.
2. **Create Therapy**, **Create Doctor** — copy returned IDs into environment (`therapyId`, `doctorId`) if building data manually; with `DemoDataSeeder` many IDs already exist.
3. **Register Receptionist** + **Login Receptionist** — **Create Slot** for `doctorId` + `slotDate`.
4. **Register Guardian** + **Login Guardian** — **Book Online** or use **Create Appointment** (needs existing `patientId` / `slotId`).
5. **Payment** — `create-order` then `verify` with Razorpay client values.
6. **Reports Summary** (Admin).

**Redis:** only `GET /api/therapy/prices` uses distributed cache key `therapy_prices` (30 min TTL; invalidated on therapy **update**).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer. Seeded admin cannot be created via Register; use Login Admin.

**HTTPS profile:** default `https://localhost:7243` (see `Properties/launchSettings.json`).

request.description: Creates a `User` with role **Guardian** (allowed: Receptionist, Doctor, Guardian). Returns `AuthResponseDto` with JWT.
After Register Guardian (or if user exists). Saves `token` and `guardianToken`.
Use the **email/password** from **Create Doctor** (`dr.ananya@therapycenter.test` / `Doctor@123` in samples). Saves `doctorToken`.
`[Authorize(Roles = Admin)]` — body: `CreateTherapyDto`. Test script saves `therapyId` from `TherapyResponseDto`.
Absolute route. Returns `TherapyPriceDto[]` (`Id`, `TherapyName`, `Price`). Service uses `IDistributedCache` key **therapy_prices** (30 min TTL).
Admin only. Invalidates Redis key `therapy_prices`. Body: `UpdateTherapyDto`.
Admin. Creates linked `User` (Doctor role) + `Doctor`. Body: `CreateDoctorDto` (`TimeOnly` as `HH:mm:ss`). Saves `doctorId`.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Ananya",
  "lastName": "Menon",
  "email": "dr.ananya@therapycenter.test",
  "password": "Doctor@123",
  "phoneNumber": "+919812345678",
  "specialization": "Pediatric Occupational Therapy",
  "bio": "10+ years experience with developmental delays.",
  "availableDays": "Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri",
  "startTime": "09:00:00",
  "endTime": "17:00:00"
}

request.description: `[Authorize(Roles = Patient,Guardian)]` — use `guardianToken` (or patient token if you add Patient users).

item.name: Get Slots By Doctor And Date

request.description: Optional query `therapyId` (not in raw URL): append `&therapyId={{therapyId}}` when needed.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": {{patientId}},
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "therapyId": {{therapyId}},
  "slotId": {{slotId}},
  "receptionistId": null,
  "notes": "Initial assessment — guardian requested morning slot."
}

request.description: Guardian. Body: `BookOnlineAppointmentDto` (creates/links patient flow in service). Saves `appointmentId`.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Arjun",
  "lastName": "Verma",
  "dateOfBirth": "2016-03-20",
  "gender": "M",
  "medicalHistory": "Mild ASD; prior OT at another clinic.",
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "therapyId": {{therapyId}},
  "appointmentDate": "{{slotDate}}",
  "startTime": "10:00:00",
  "endTime": "10:45:00"
}

request.description: `PatientSummaryDto[]` for current guardian. Test script saves first `patientId`.

item.name: Guardian Dashboard
item.description: Shortcut folder for **Guardian** JWT (`guardianToken`). Same URLs as elsewhere; no extra Redis-only APIs beyond therapy prices.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Arjun",
  "lastName": "Verma",
  "dateOfBirth": "2016-03-20",
  "gender": "M",
  "medicalHistory": "Mild ASD; prior OT at another clinic.",
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "therapyId": {{therapyId}},
  "appointmentDate": "{{slotDate}}",
  "startTime": "10:00:00",
  "endTime": "10:45:00"
}

request.description: Admin or Guardian. Body: `CreateOrderDto` (`appointmentId`). Saves `razorpayOrderId` from response `orderId` for verify step.
Body: `VerifyPaymentDto` — fill from Razorpay checkout response.
Body: `UpdateUserDto`. Set `userId` from login or list users.
Dangerous — use a disposable test user id.
